name: procureos-web
description: ProcureOS Web — Express API + React admin (MySQL)

scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix admin install --include=dev && node admin/gen-entry.js && npm --prefix admin run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.rmSync('admin/spa.html',{force:true});const p='server/webui/spa.html';if(fs.existsSync(p))fs.renameSync(p,'server/webui/spa.tpl')"
